fields.title: Port remaining hermes software-development skills to tau
fields.description: Port the missing SKILL.md files from .reference/hermes-agent/skills/software-development into extensions/tau/skills, adapting frontmatter, tool references, cross-references, and examples for pi/tau.
fields.close_reason: Ported the five missing software-development SKILL.md files into extensions/tau/skills, adapted for pi/tau, and verified with npm run gate.
